components.name: Button
components.summary: A softly rounded editorial button for primary calls to action, supporting calm secondary emphasis and deliberate destructive actions.

components.name: Card
components.summary: A premium dashboard surface for metrics, narratives, and compact workflows, using warm neutral contrast and spacious internal rhythm.

components.name: Input
components.summary: A refined text-entry field designed for filters, search, and profile settings with quiet borders and clear focus feedback.

components.name: Sidebar Navigation
components.summary: A persistent navigation rail that frames dashboard sections with understated hierarchy, tactile active states, and premium account context.

components.name: Data Table
components.summary: A warm-toned analytical table for operational dashboards, balancing legibility, sorting clarity, and restrained row emphasis.

components.name: Chart Panel
components.summary: A narrative chart container that pairs headline metrics, chart legends, and contextual notes inside a premium editorial frame.

toneGuidelines: Prefer sentence case labels over all-caps controls.
Use concise, editorial microcopy with a composed and confident voice.
Let warm neutrals carry most surfaces and reserve stronger contrast for hierarchy or action.
